firstNightReminder: Show the Cobbler 1 in-play good character token & 1 in-play evil character token, or 1 not-in-play good character token & 1 not-in-play evil character token.
name: Cobbler
ability: You start knowing 1 good & 1 evil character: they are either both in-play or not at all.

firstNightReminder: Point at 2 players who'd benefit the Pyreseer's team by dying tomorrow.
name: Pyreseer
ability: You start knowing 2 players who'd help your team by being executed tomorrow.

name: Samurai
ability: You & Minions start knowing a rule. If a Minion breaks this rule, you learn them.

firstNightReminder: If it's the Herald's 1st or 2nd night, show the hand signal (0, 1, 2, etc.) for how many other players woke before them (due to their own ability).
otherNightReminder: If it's the Herald's 1st or 2nd night, show the hand signal (0, 1, 2, etc.) for how many other players woke before them (due to their own ability).
name: Herald
ability: On your 1st and 2nd night, learn how many other players woke up due to their own ability.

firstNightReminder: The Hierophant points at a player. Give the appropriate thumb signal.
otherNightReminder: The Hierophant points at a player. Give the appropriate thumb signal.
name: Hierophant
ability: Each night, choose a player: you learn how helpful they are being to their team.
flavor: Come with me, and I shall show you the way.”

name: Debutante
ability: Each night, learn a player and a character: if in-play, they’re good, if out-of-play, they’re evil.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Fireprod to choose a player, they are marked with a 'Tended' reminder token.
otherNightReminder: If the Fireprod has used their 'Once per game' ability, do not wake them. Wake the Fireprod to choose a player, they are marked with a 'Tended' reminder token.
name: Fireprod
ability: Each night, choose a player. You may (once) choose to learn which chosen player is closest to the Demon.
flavor: Oh it’s awfully chilly outside, please, I do ask that you stay in. I shall have the maids prepare some hot tea, we shall find you a novel that best fits your inclinations, and we shall stay close to the fireplace.

otherNightReminder: Point to 3 different players.
name: Cimlaaq
ability: Each night, learn 3 players: tomorrow, you may name a statement about them to the Storyteller. If false, you lose your ability.
flavor: The wind blows away so many good things, so stay under the roof of those who you understand you.

name: Tactician
ability: Each night*, choose 2 living players: learn which one the Storyteller thinks it’d be better for the Demon to kill tonight.

name: Hostess
ability: Each night, choose a player: learn 2 others, at least 1 of which is their alignment.

name: Falconer
ability: On your 1st night, choose a character. 1-4 nights later, learn who that character is (or that it's not in play, then choose another).

otherNightReminder: Point your thumb clockwise or anti-clockwise relative to the Seafarer player.
name: Seafarer
ability: Each night*, learn if the Demon's kill nearest to themselves was closer clockwise or anti-clockwise (starting from the Demon).

name: Scribe
ability: Each night*, if you nominated today, learn how many evil players voted on it.

otherNightReminder: The previously protected lose their markers. The Trapper points to two players. The 1st time the Demon chooses one, they are prompted to choose again.
name: Trapsmith
ability: Each night*, choose 2 players (not yourself). The 1st time the Demon attacks either tonight, they must choose someone else instead.

name: Mycologist
ability: Each night, choose 2 players (not yourself): if either is evil, neither can die tonight or tomorrow day.

name: Cosmonaut
ability: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller to learn a cryptic hint about the gamestate.

name: Pilgrim
ability: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller to ask a subjective quesiton about a not-in-play Traveler.

otherNightReminder: If the Marchioness named no Demons today, kill a named player.
name: Marchioness
ability: Each day, you may publicly name at least 2 players. If none are the Demon, one dies tonight.

name: Beetle
ability: Each day, you may publicly guess which evil character is "about to die". If correct, they are executed immediately.

name: Dreamweaver
ability: Each day*, visit the Storyteller and choose a player. You learn which character type killed them, if any.

name: Milkmaid
ability: If you die at night, learn 1 evil player. [+0 or +1 Milkmaid]

name: Orchard Keeper
ability: There are an even number of Outsiders in play. [+0 or +1 Outsiders]

name: Dovecotman
ability: Outsiders "mad" they are the Dovecotman might be drunk & not die at night. [+1 Outsider]
flavor: How many people does it take to run a dovecot? Not zero, I'll say. These little nobles require true care and attention.

name: Chanteuse
ability: If the Demon just killed the most important good player, you are woken to learn an evil player.

name: Lucky Cat
ability: If the Demon kills you, all players learn this. From now on, if an evil player dies by execution, good wins.

name: Unicorn
ability: Minions start knowing an improbable condition & you know a clue to it. If it happens (once), you're executed, even if dead.

name: Detective
ability: The 1st time you nominate a player, if it is the Demon, you turn evil & win.

name: Debtor
ability: On Night 4, you & another player die. If you’d die before then, instead add 1 to how many die.

firstNightReminder: During Minion Info, point to the Minion that the Demon doesn't know and show all the Minions the Roi Fainéant token.
name: Roi Fainéant
ability: Minions know which Minion the Demon doesn't know. The Demon thinks they're evil. [+1 Minion, the Demon is good]

name: Rat
ability: The Demon knows who you are. Each night, they may choose which becomes the evil Minion they replaced. [An extra Rat replaces a Minion]

name: Understudy
ability: Each night*, if you were less helpful to your team today than yesterday, you or a good neighbour dies.

firstNightReminder: The Glimjack shakes their head 'no' or points to a player. If that player is evil, nod your head 'yes'. If that player is good, shake your head 'no'.
otherNightReminder: If this is the final night, show the 'You are' card and the thumbs up signal for 'Good'. The Glimjack shakes their head 'no' or points to a player. If that player is evil, nod your head 'yes'. If that player is good, shake your head 'no'.
name: Glimjack
ability: Twice per game, at night, choose a player: learn if they're evil. You're evil until the final night, even if dead, drunk or poisoned.

name: Occultist
ability: You might be executed unless you are mad about learning something new every day. Once per game, when you visit the Storyteller, you learn a fact.
flavor:
Flesh is weaker than silver is weaker
than rot is weaker than the divine is
weaker than rot is weaker than silver
is weaker than flesh. It’s a cycle. Get
it? I don’t.

name: Investor
ability: 1 Townsfolk might register as evil & as a Demon, even if dead. If they would die at night, another player might die instead.

name: Showman
ability: Players who don't applaud your (& only your) death might die at any time.
flavor: The greatest performance in life, unarguably, comes at the end. So, I ask you once more: are the masses yet to be entertained!?

otherNightReminder: The Chupacabra might point at a player. :reminder:
name: Chupacabra
ability: Each night*, you may choose a player nominated by evil today: they die.

name: Bookwyrm
ability: Each day, if you guess what the Librarian learned, your team wins tonight. [1 Outsider, +The Librarian]

otherNightReminder: If no VISITED reminder on the Grimoire during the night, wake the Wine Gremlin. They point at any player. Remove any preexisting MASKED reminders. Mark the chosen player with the MASKED reminder
name: Wine Gremlin
ability: Each day, 1 good player chooses 2 alive non-Travellers, or you choose 1 tonight: to Townsfolk, they register as evil Demons until next choice.
attribution: Lady Mist, The Wine Gremlin icon has been made by Eddy, but is a little gnome-ike creature hiding behind a wine bottle
flavor: Aw, c'mon! You've had such a long day. One more sip won't hurt. One more glass won't hurt. One more bottle won't hurt. Just drown your sorrows out!

firstNightReminder: Wake the Impresario to choose a day.
otherNightReminder: If the Impresario's chosen day was yesterday, wake them to become the executed character.
name: Impresario
ability: Once per game, at night, choose to become the character executed tomorrow (unless 3 live). Each day, if no-one is executed, evil wins.

name: Gizmo
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a Demon: become it, & if you don’t claim Gizmo when nominated you lose if executed.

name: Will o' Wisp
ability: The 1st time each Townsfolk player's ability would yield true info, it's false.

name: Trader
ability: You know a night & a Minion ability you have. On that night, your ability is replaced & 1 good player learns your old one.
flavor: Hmmm… nope this one sucks. NEXT!

name: Errata
ability: You know who you poison: it's a Townsfolk if 0 or 1 Outsiders live & an Outsider if 3 or more live. [-1 to +1 Outsiders]

name: Procession
ability: Outsiders might register as an evil Procession. If there’s 1 Outsider, you keep your ability whilst dead. [Exactly 1 or +1 Outsider]

name: Sentry
ability: If your team loses, all players claim a character: if no-one lied or you guess an opposing player who did, your team wins. [-1 to +1 Outsider]

name: Gasanthesheshu
ability: For each good player who's mad that you're in play, 1 good player might die at any time (until 2 nights from now).
flavor: Beacon. Bright. Stolen. Light. Humans. Thieves. Humans. Die. Humans. Will. Return. The Beacon. Humans. Will. Return. The Light.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Demon, show them the Styx token, if they nod, swap their characters.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Demon, show them the Styx token, if they nod, swap their characters. If you deem so, rise any dead evil players you want.
name: Styx
ability: Dead evil players might rise, even if you're dead. The Demon may (once) swap characters with a Styx.
flavor: WE WILL NOT GO WILLINGLY. NOT BY YOUR SWORDS NOR CROSSES, STONES OR SHOVELS. YOU WILL DIE DEEPER THAN YOU CAN BURY US.

name: Ruffian
ability: The 1st time you vote for an evil player & they're executed that day, they don't die. If just 3 players live, lose this ability.

name: Drill Sergeant
ability: Each nomination, votes are tallied instantly on 3, even if dead. The Storyteller can nominate & you suggest who each night.

otherNightReminder: The Azoumir chooses a player: they die. If it is an even night, a Minion becomes a different not in-play Minion.
name: Azoumir
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Every 2nd night, choose a Minion character: if not in-play, a Minion becomes it.

firstNightReminder: Place the 'False World' reminder on the Umbra.
otherNightReminder: The Umbra points to a player.
name: Umbra
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Each time you kill an Outsider, Townsfolk info is reversed. It starts false. [+1 Outsider]

otherNightReminder: Wake and have them choose a player: They die, & mark one of their good neighbors with the "poisoned" reminder.
name: Myrkkymato
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die & poison 1 good neighbor until dusk.

name: Vitoo
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If you nominate a Minion & they live, swap characters tonight.

name: Nykthyr
ability: Each night*, unless you killed 2 Townsfolk last night, choose 2 players: they die. [+1 Outsider]

otherNightReminder: The Babbako points to a player. If it is currently 'A Feast' and Minions live, the Babbako must choose a living Minion, or you shake your head 'no'.
name: Babbako
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. If you've killed 1 good player for each Minion, you must kill Minions if any live. [+1 Minion]

name: Runewyrm
ability: Each night*, if you voted for today’s executee, choose 2 players: they die. Otherwise, a player dies*.

otherNightReminder: The Ahe points to a player.
name: Ahe
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. [Minions are good, but think they're evil. 1 or 2 Townsfolk are evil for each Minion]

otherNightReminder: The Tomma Tabu, if a player, points to a player.
name: Tomma Tabu
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Demons & Minions left in the bag are the Storyteller. [All Outsiders are in the bag]

firstNightReminder: Do not inform the Demon or their Minions who each other are.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Au’Wre. They point to a number of players equal to the number of in-play Minions: indicate which of the people they chose are Minions. If all of them are, place the "Found Minions" reminder.
name: Au’Wre
ability: Each night*, guess your Minions: learn which are correct. If all are, good learns this, and must kill evil today or lose. [Evil don’t learn each other]

otherNightReminder: Change the Matsuraid reminder for the next day. :reminder:
name: Matsuraid
ability: Evil votes secretly don't count & only 2 are required. Dead executees' teams lose. After day 3, evil wins. [Some players are evil]

name: Mixologist
ability: Drunk or poisoned players cannot learn true info.

name: Sommelier
ability: Use the Sommelier's suggested substitutions. All players know which ones are in use.

name: Scholar
ability: Something good might happen to players who remind or inform the Storyteller.
